name: FLAMBERGE
short_description: Flamberge is a tactics RPG featuring free movement and simultaneous turns. Players plan out their moves ahead of time, then during execution, both allies and enemies will act at the same time.
detailed_description:
How much content is there?

About 3-4 hours. 3 out of 6 chapters are done.
A multiplayer beta is happening right now. Read this post for details:


Discord


Please come check out the Discord! The multiplayer beta is handled through there.
Temporary tester codes are available if you or a friend want to test out the beta with us.
In-game issues/feedback/improvements are tracked and posted through the Discord as well.


Want to follow the development?

Follow me on Twitter - . I post a lot there.


About the Game

FLAMBERGE is a tactics role-playing game featuring simultaneous turns. The player must plan out movements and attacks for each of their heroes, and then execute the turn. When the turn is executed, both heroes and enemies will move and attack at once. The player must anticipate enemy actions in order to win.

Join a diverse array of heroes seeking to save their homeland from an invading force. Command your allies, instructing them to carry out various class abilities and utilize interesting items. Always think one step ahead.
